description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Packages that builds and packages ThunderEngine for multiple platforms. The workflow triggers on push and pull request events, excluding certain paths. It sets up environment variables, including QT_VERSION, QTCREATOR_VERSION, and VERSION. The workflow consists of multiple jobs for different platforms: version, linux, android, osx, ios, tvos, windows, and freebsd. Each job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and builds the package using Qbs.
